message:
fix: resolve React render loop crash on mobile viewports (#5621)

* fix: resolve React render loop crash on mobile viewports

Remove isActive from useEffect dependency array in useTour.tsx.
Including isActive in deps while calling setIsActive in the effect
body creates an infinite setState cycle on mobile (React error #185:
Maximum update depth exceeded). Only isMobile is needed as a dep
since the effect unconditionally disables the tour on mobile.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix: resolve mobile viewport render loop crash (React error #185)

Fix infinite setState loops in 4 components that crash on mobile:
- useTour.tsx: remove isActive from useEffect deps (was in effect body)
- DashboardGrid.tsx: guard setIsNarrow with value check
- SharedSortableCard.tsx: guard setIsNarrow with value check
- CustomDashboard.tsx: guard setIsNarrowRange with value check

All 4 had the same pattern: unconditional setState inside useEffect
with dozens of card instances causing cascading re-renders that exceed
React's maximum update depth on mobile viewports.

Also add mobile viewport tests to nightly Playwright suite
(react-render-errors.spec.ts) to catch this class of bug.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
